---
description: 'Use when: generating Git commit messages or reviewing commit message format.'
---

Follow Conventional Commits with this format: type(scope): subject

Allowed types: build, ci, chore, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, revert, style, test.

Use lower-case type.
Use imperative present tense in subject.
Start subject with lower-case.
Do not end subject with a period.
Limit the header line to 72 characters.
Prefer adding a clear scope when possible (for example taxonomy, home, logo, ci, deps).
